mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO image_assets ( image_id, rspu_id, variant_id, rsku_id, image_type, storage_path, storage_url, file_size, width, height, format, is_primary, ai_processed, quality_score, uploaded_by, created_at, deleted_at ) VALUES
( #{item.imageId}, #{item.rspuId}, #{item.variantId}, #{item.rskuId}, #{item.imageType}, #{item.storagePath}, #{item.storageUrl}, #{item.fileSize}, #{item.width}, #{item.height}, #{item.format}, #{item.primary}, #{item.aiProcessed}, #{item.qualityScore}, #{item.uploadedBy}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.deletedAt} )
